settings.name: Heritage
settings.description: Four generations of goldsmithing experience from Rajasthan, India — the historical centre of jewelled arts.

settings.name: Innovation
settings.description: Heritage without innovation is a museum. RALJE bridges traditional Rajasthani craft with modern technology.

settings.name: Personalisation
settings.description: There is no catalogue. Every RALJE piece is designed around a specific person and a specific moment.

settings.name: Legacy
settings.description: The finished piece is a legacy object — something to wear, pass down, and attach meaning to for generations.

settings.label: The Archive
settings.heading: LEGACIES
settings.subtitle: Pieces that have left the atelier. Each one made for a single person, a single moment.

settings.label: The Piece Journey
settings.heading: SIX CEREMONIES
settings.subtitle: A piece passes through six ceremonies, from the first message to the anniversary of its wearing.

settings.name: The Inquiry
settings.description: A message arrives. Within twenty-four hours, the founder replies in first person.

settings.name: The Consultation
settings.description: A scheduled conversation, voice or in person. By the end: a written brief, a budget range, a date.

settings.name: The Vision
settings.description: A photo-real 3D rendering, lit as the piece will wear. The client signs the Vision before any metal is cut.

settings.name: The Craft
settings.description: The silence phase. The piece is cast, set, finished, marked. Two updates only.

settings.name: The Delivery
settings.description: The piece arrives sealed with wax, accompanied by the certificate and the founder's handwritten letter.

settings.name: The Aftercare
settings.description: One year later, a letter from the founder. No sales offer. A question about the piece's first year.
